<!-- Keep the title in Conventional Commit form, e.g. "feat(members): ..." -->

## What and why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? Link any issue: "Closes #123". -->

## How it was tested

<!-- Which suites did you run, and/or how did you verify it by hand? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to one concern, with logical commits (Conventional Commits).
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for new/changed behavior, and the relevant suites pass locally.
- [ ] Any change to a public surface (REST / GraphQL / events / queue) is called out below, with clients and docs updated.
- [ ] Structural or non-trivial decisions are captured in an ADR under `docs/decisions/`.
- [ ] Docs (README / service READMEs) updated if behavior or setup changed.

## Contract / compatibility notes

<!-- Any breaking or backward-incompatible change to an API, event, schema, or config? "None" is a fine answer. -->
